overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Mafia III showing the protagonist walking through a rainy 1960s urban downtown. The character moves along wet sidewalks past a mix of historic brick architecture and modern glass buildings, crossing intersections while pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the damp streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with hedge row and benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk in a trench coat, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: woman with umbrella walking past the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: continuous row of green hedges lining the sidewalk edge
multi-story red brick building with arched windows across the street
modern concrete park bench on the sidewalk
mature deciduous tree with autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked sidewalk bordered by a hedge row on the right. Across the street stands a historic brick building, while pedestrians occasionally pass by. The wet concrete reflects the overcast sky as the character approaches an intersection.

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the street intersection
character finishes crossing and steps onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt intersection toward a modern business district

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress with black umbrella crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: tall modern building with vertical glass and concrete stripes
1960s era sedans parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection, moving from the hedge-lined sidewalk toward a modern business district. A woman in a red dress with an umbrella crosses ahead, while vintage cars are parked along the new sidewalk. The modern glass office tower dominates the left side as the character reaches the other side.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with modern office building and historic architecture

events.description: character turns into direct sunlight creating strong lens flare and backlit conditions

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk with strong sun glare reflecting off the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: man in hat leaning against the modern building wall

entered.detail: building with distinctive arched windows and classical facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along the downtown sidewalk with the modern glass tower on the left and historic buildings on the right, the character moves into direct sunlight causing intense lens flare. The wet pavement reflects the bright light as pedestrians walk along the street, and vintage cars remain parked along the curb.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban downtown that transitions from a muted, overcast atmosphere into a burst of brilliant sunlight. It begins with the character walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk bordered by a hedge row, moving past a historic brick building under a gray, reflective sky. As the character crosses a wide intersection, the environment shifts toward a modern business district where a woman in a red dress with an umbrella leads the way toward a towering glass office building. The scene then expands along a downtown corridor flanked by a mix of modern and historic architecture, with vintage cars parked along the curb. Finally, the overcast light gives way to direct sunlight, creating intense lens flares that shimmer across the wet pavement as the character continues forward.
